in_progress.title: T-001 — Check conclusion of run 25489311400 and declare PASS or escalate
in_progress.manager_instruction: Check latestObserverQaDetail for run 25489311400 (SHA bf74ed3). If SUCCESS → declare 🟢 T-001 PASS — DEPLOY SIGNAL in QA_REPORT.md. If FAILURE (fifth consecutive) → report whatever error text is available from latestObserverQaDetail (even partial), note the count, confirm deploy gate active. If still in_progress → note it, do not redispatch, await next cycle. Note live SHA from /api/version.

in_progress.title: CRITICAL — Retrieve verbatim step 7 Playwright log from GitHub Actions
in_progress.manager_instruction: Use the GitHub API to retrieve the full log archive for run 25488843096 (most recent confirmed failure). Endpoint: GET https://api.github.com/repos/CommonEmailDotCom/SaaS-Boilerplate/actions/runs/25488843096/logs — returns a zip archive. Extract the step 7 log file (look for a file named after the Playwright step). Paste the verbatim Playwright error — test name, assertion failure, stack trace — into BUILD_LOG.md. If the zip approach is blocked, try the jobs endpoint: GET https://api.github.com/repos/CommonEmailDotCom/SaaS-Boilerplate/actions/runs/25488843096/jobs to get job_id, then GET /repos/CommonEmailDotCom/SaaS-Boilerplate/actions/jobs/{job_id}/logs. Exact error text is the only thing that unblocks T-001.

in_progress.title: Add error logging to getActiveProvider() DB fallback
in_progress.manager_instruction: In src/libs/auth-provider/index.ts, in the catch block that falls back to AUTH_PROVIDER env var, add: console.error('[getActiveProvider] DB error — falling back to env var:', err). Do not modify any exports. Small targeted change only. Commit and push. Update BUILD_LOG.md.

in_progress.title: Fix smokeStatus reader in orchestrator — fs.readFileSync → GitHub API
in_progress.manager_instruction: In orchestrator.js (MCP server repo), replace fs.readFileSync('smoke-status.json') with a GitHub API fetch: const res = await fetch('https://api.github.com/repos/CommonEmailDotCom/SaaS-Boilerplate/contents/smoke-status.json', { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN}`, 'User-Agent': 'mcp-server' } }); const json = await res.json(); const smokeStatus = JSON.parse(Buffer.from(json.content, 'base64').toString()); Update MCP server repo and redeploy via Coolify UUID a1fr37jiwehxbfqp90k4cvsw. Log the redeploy SHA and Coolify run ID in BUILD_LOG.md.

operator_tasks.title: Diagnose Playwright step 7 failure and prepare fix
operator_tasks.manager_instruction: Once verbatim error log is retrieved (TASK-G), diagnose root cause. Possibilities: selector not found, OAuth bot-detection, wrong base URL, test logic error, missing env var, timeout. Log diagnosis in BUILD_LOG.md. Prepare fix using correct import paths (Hard Rule #11). Do not push until root cause is confirmed and fix is validated locally or logically. If root cause is OAuth/Google bot detection, escalate to Manager immediately — that requires owner intervention.

architecture_notes_for_agents: Coolify auto-deploy is OFF — only set-version.yml triggers deploys on real src/ commits.
observer-qa.yml is workflow_dispatch ONLY — no push trigger.
smokeTestRuns, setVersionRuns, and typecheck runs skipping on ci: commits is CORRECT — NEVER escalate these (Hard Rule #10).
Only latestObserverQaDetail is relevant to T-001 status.
Middleware: Edge runtime — only import from provider-constant.ts.
trustHost: true must stay in next-auth config.
Coolify SaaS UUID: tuk1rcjj16vlk33jrbx3c9d3. MCP UUID: a1fr37jiwehxbfqp90k4cvsw.
T-007 + T-010 live as a815e93. Formal validation pending T-001 PASS. T-007 never ships without T-010.

Import paths (Hard Rule #11): authentikAuth() not getServerSession, @/libs/DB not @/libs/db, @/models/Schema not @/libs/schema, organizationMemberSchema not organizationMember. Never remove exports from auth-provider/index.ts.

GitHub Actions log endpoint for a run: GET https://api.github.com/repos/CommonEmailDotCom/SaaS-Boilerplate/actions/runs/{run_id}/logs (returns zip). Jobs endpoint: GET /actions/runs/{run_id}/jobs then /actions/jobs/{job_id}/logs.
